summary: نظام التحكم في الأسعار - اختبار شامل. جميع APIs Backend والواجهة الأمامية تعمل بشكل صحيح. تم اختبار: 1) شريط الأكثر مبيعاً والأقل سعراً في صفحة المنتجات، 2) نظام الإبلاغ عن الأسعار المرتفعة من العملاء، 3) لوحة تحكم الأدمن لإدارة البلاغات
critical_code_review_comments: Backend products.py lines 333-397: best-sellers and lowest-price endpoints correctly implemented with caching
Backend price_reports.py: Full CRUD system for price reports with privacy protection (reporter_name hidden)
Frontend ProductsPage.js lines 554-699: Best Sellers and Lowest Price sections with correct styling
Frontend ProductDetailPage.js lines 22-191: ReportPriceModal component with reason options and privacy notice
Frontend PriceReportsTab.js: Complete admin dashboard for managing reports and seller violations
seed_data_creation: Created 2 price reports via API tests for testing admin dashboard
context_for_next_testing_agent: Price Control System fully working: 1) GET /api/products/best-sellers returns products sorted by sales_count desc, 2) GET /api/products/lowest-price returns products sorted by price asc, 3) POST /api/price-reports creates report with privacy protection, 4) Admin endpoints at /api/price-reports/admin/* for stats and management, 5) Frontend shows best-sellers (red) and lowest-price (green) sections on /products page, 6) 'سعر مرتفع؟' button appears for logged-in users on product detail page, 7) Admin can access price reports at /admin?tab=price-reports

GET_products_best_sellers.verification: Returns products sorted by sales_count descending with caching

GET_products_lowest_price.verification: Returns products sorted by price ascending, excludes zero price/stock

POST_price_reports.verification: Creates price report, requires auth, validates product existence, prevents duplicates

GET_price_reports_admin_stats.verification: Returns counts: total, pending, approved, rejected, warning (admin only)

GET_price_reports_admin_all.verification: Returns paginated reports list with seller info, hides reporter_name for privacy

frontend_best_sellers_section.verification: Shows red/pink gradient section with products sorted by sales, has عرض الكل link

frontend_lowest_price_section.verification: Shows green gradient section with lowest priced products, has عرض الكل link

frontend_report_price_button.verification: 'سعر مرتفع؟' button visible for logged-in users, opens ReportPriceModal

frontend_report_price_modal.verification: Modal shows 5 reason options, suggested price input, privacy notice, submit button

frontend_admin_price_reports_tab.verification: Tab shows stats cards, reports list, filter options, sellers with violations tab
